ralph.role: Squad Lead - strategic continuity, persistent memory, decision broker. Calls votes, breaks ties, and owns the institutional record.

scribe.role: Knowledge archivist + R&D - captures decisions, maintains the wisdom log, and prototypes new tooling for the team.

bench.intended_role: Architect - system design, infra patterns, hard tech calls.
Security & red team - adversarial scenarios, threat modeling, breakglass procedures.
Data science & evaluation - golden scenarios, eval gates, model quality measurement.
Observability & reliability - telemetry, SLOs, incident response.
Onboarding & developer advocacy - docs, tutorials, the friendly first contact.
Operations & delivery - CI/CD, release management, deployment integrity.
Anomaly detection & agent QA - drift watching, regression hunting, behavioral evals.
Architectural reviewer - counterfactuals, future-state design reviews, contingency planning.
